spec_natural_language: function _updatePauseDuration MUST revert when the contract is currently paused (pauseStartTime != 0 and within pause window)

violated_invariant.precondition: contract is currently paused (pauseStartTime != 0 and block.timestamp < pauseStartTime + pauseDuration)
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: revert to prevent unintentional unpausing of the contract

extraction_reasoning: The finding clearly describes that _updatePauseDuration lacks a whenNotPaused check, allowing it to reset pauseStartTime to 0 when the contract is already paused, effectively unpausing it. The invariant is explicit: the function should only be callable when not paused. The fix is explicitly provided with the whenNotPaused modifier.
